title: skimmia japonica subsp. reevesiana
intro: Skimmia japonica subsp. reevesiana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Skimmia japonica subsp. reevesiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to support respiratory and gastrointestinal health.
